description: Tiered Python bindings parity contract for Rust core APIs, including callable member export paths.

tierDefinitions.tier1: Must-have Python APIs required by maintained integration workflows.
tierDefinitions.tier2: Deferred or lower-priority APIs outside initial gate scope.

scanlog.description: Crash log orchestration, parsing, and analysis APIs.

config.description: YAML data and runtime configuration APIs.

version_registry.description: Game version lookup and compatibility APIs.

aux.description: Auxiliary modules outside core phase-1 workflow APIs.
